ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS SUE HUYNH-WONG AND PAUL P. LEE'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND/OR ORDER SHORTENING TIME ; OSC - 2/15/17 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501, OPPOSITION - 2/3/17, REPLY - 2/10/17. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS DISSOLVED. PURSUANT TO JANUARY 18, 2017 ORDER PLAINTIFF WAS TO SERVE THE ORDER AND SUPPORTING PAPERS BY JANUARY 19, 2017. PROOF OF SERVICE TO BE FILED AT LEAST 5 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. THE ONLY PROOF OF SERVICE OF FILE WAS FILED ON JANUARY 27, 2017. IT INDICATES THAT ONLY THE ORDER WAS GIVEN TO THE COURIER WAS SERVICE; THAT THE ORDER WAS "CAUSED" TO BE SERVED ON STEVEN N. RICHMAN, ESQ. (WITHOUT ANY INDICATION WHICH DEFENDANT IS BEING SERVED OR WHETHER ATTORNEY AGREED TO ACCEPT SERVICE; THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION. OSC: RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION MUST BE SERVED IN THE SAME MANNER AS SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT); THAT ON JANUARY 19, 2017 ANNETTE HALVOSON, WHOSE BUSINESS ADDRESS IS IN WALNUT CREEK, GAVE AN ENVELOPE CONTAINING THE ORDER TO A COURIER TO BE DELIVERED TO STEVEN N. RICHMAN, WHOSE ADDRESS IS IN LOS ANGELES, PRESUMABLY TO BE DELIVERED BY THE END OF BUSINESS DAY ON JANUARY 19, 2017 AS REQUIRED BY THE ORDER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE BY THE COURIER FILED. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: NEWTON J. LAM, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2019, APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND STATEMENT OF THE CASE - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER WITHOUT HEARING. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH-WONG, SUE LEE, PAUL P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK ONE MORTGAGE CORPORATION, AS SUCCESSOR TO BANK ONE ARIZONA, NA ACACIA INVESTMENTS,LLC, AS SUCCESSOR TO ACACIABANK, A CALIFORNIA INDUSTRIAL LOAN COMPANY SEE SCANNED DOC - (1) THIS JUDGMENT AFFECTS THE REAL PROPERTY LOCATED IN THE COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO COMMONLY KNOWN AS 1567 31ST AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, AND BEARS THE ASSESSOR'S PARCEL NO. LOT 017, BLOCK 1877; (2) TITLE TO THE SUBJECT PROPERTY IS HEREBY QUITED IN PLAINTIFFS SUE HUYNH-WONG AND PAUL P. LEE; (3) DEFENDANTS HAVE NO TITLE, ESTATE, INTEREST, LIEN OR RIGHT IN THE SUBJECT PROPERTY; (4) THE APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT RECORDED DECEMBER 4, 2012 ENCUMBERING THE SUBJECT REAL PROPERTY IS OF NO FORCE AND EFFECT AS TO PLAINTIFFS; AND (5) UPON PRESENTATION OF A CERTIFIED COPY OF THIS JUDGMENT AND PAYMENT OF ANY RECORDING FEES REQUIRED BY LAW, THE OFFICE OF RECORDER, SAN FRANISCO COUNTY IS ORDER TO ACCEPT THIS JUDGMENT FOR RECORDING AND TO RECORD IT FORTHWITH IN THE OFFICIAL RECORDS OF SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY.

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dave McGraw (925-817-3714) for Plaintiff Sue Huynh-Wong.
No Other Appearances.

Hearing is held. Argued re: service. The court inquires re: compliance with Tentative Ruling Rule. Plaintiff confirms compliance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause is OFF CALENDAR. The Temporary Restraining Order is dissolved. Pursuant to January 18, 2017 Order Plaintiff was to serve the Order and supporting papers by January 19, 2017. Proof of service to be filed at least 5 court days prior to hearing. The only Proof of Service of file was filed on January 27, 2017. It indicates that only the Order was given to the courier was service; that the order was "caused" to be served on Steven N. Richman, Esq. (without any indication which Defendant is being served or whether attorney agreed to accept service; there is no proof of service for summons and complaint in this action. OSC: Re Preliminary Injunction must be served in the same manner as summons and complaint); that on January 19, 2017 Annette Halvoson, whose business address is in Walnut Creek, gave an envelope containing the Order to a courier to be delivered to Steven N. Richman, whose address is in Los Angeles, presumably to be delivered by the end of business day on January 19, 2017 as required by the order. No Proof of Service by the courier filed. Plaintiff to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
